summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Accept Application feature. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified: Admin can accept applications, credentials modal displays email/password/employee_number, application status changes from 'Neu' to 'Akzeptiert', and new employee can login at /mitarbeiter/login with generated credentials and access their dashboard.

minor_html_warnings.issue: Console warning about <span> not being valid child of <tbody>/<tr> - React hydration warning, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Accept application endpoint correctly generates 12-char password with letters, digits, and special chars
Employee number auto-increments correctly (EMP001, EMP002, etc.)
Credentials modal includes important warning about password only shown once
Added data-testid attributes to AdminLogin and MitarbeiterLogin forms for better testability
seed_data_creation: Accepted Jeffrey Eppstein application during testing, created employee EMP009
context_for_next_testing_agent: Accept Application feature fully tested. POST /api/applications/{id}/accept creates employee with auto-generated password. Frontend credentials modal shows email, password, employee_number after acceptance. New employee can login at /mitarbeiter/login. Backend test file covers: accept success, status update, duplicate accept prevention, auth requirements, and new employee login/access.

admin_accept_flow: View applications table with Status column - PASS
Status shows 'Akzeptiert' (green) for accepted apps - PASS
Status shows 'Neu' (blue) for new apps - PASS
Credentials modal shows email, password, employee_number - PASS
Modal includes warning about password visibility - PASS
Copy buttons present for credentials - PASS
Toast notification appears on success - PASS
new_employee_login: Dashboard shows employee name and info - PASS
Stats cards display correctly (0 tasks) - PASS
